headline: Is It Time To Reconsider Eastman Chemical (EMN) After Mixed Returns And Cash Flow Outlook?
summary: If you are wondering whether Eastman Chemical at US$74.12 is pricing in too much optimism or not enough, a useful starting point is to understand what the current share price is implying about the company. The stock is up 3.5% over the past week and 2.2% over the past month, with a year to date gain of 15.2%, but a decline of 3.5% over the last year and a longer term decline of 29.2% over five years. These mixed returns have kept attention on what is driving sentiment and whether...
